element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns light monitor, shadow usage, and quiet flooring in controlled urban environments
Non-lethal takedown option for single guards in low-risk scenarios

element_introduction_order.element: Bow and specialized arrows (water arrows for lights)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn to douse lights to create shadow passages; water arrows become primary tool for environmental control
Required for crossing loud flooring near patrol routes; increases tactical complexity
Opens verticality in level design; players discover rooftop and upper-level passages
Mechanical eye zooming allows pre-planning routes and patrol pattern observation without exposing player
Players learn guard behavior, patrol patterns, and body-hiding mechanics throughout campaign
Cannot be knocked out; require avoidance or arrow elimination; introduce mechanical threat type
Mechanist-aligned technology; requires understanding of detection zones and timing
Multi-stage objectives teach players to plan complex action sequences and manage mission priorities

element_introduction_order.element: Economy system (stealing valuables for gear purchases)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Optional collection system provides non-mandatory engagement; enables player customization of loadout

element_introduction_order.element: Lethal combat restriction (highest difficulty no-kill enforcement)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Expert mode eliminates combat as fallback option; entire mission design requires pure stealth

typical_relief_triggers: Successfully hiding in shadow after guard passes
Creating light cover with water arrows
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Methodical and player-controlled; tension generated by planning gaps and execution risks rather than scripted pressure. Pause-friendly design encourages reconnaissance and route-planning. Tension escalates with mission complexity and difficulty modifier rather than time pressure.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Valuables and treasure scattered throughout levels; optional collection supports economy but not mandatory for mission completion
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Upper levels, rooftops, and alternative passages accessible via rope arrows signal optional high-value areas; unlit alcoves and maintenance tunnels indicate secret routes

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-paced introduction to stealth fundamentals and basic tools. Simple guard patterns in relatively open urban spaces allow error recovery.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of security automatons and surveillance cameras escalates mechanical threat complexity. Mission objectives become multi-stage with competing priorities.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dense guard concentrations, advanced Mechanist technology, and mission objectives requiring precision execution and complex routing. Pagan faction involvement introduces narrative tension.
notable_spikes: Mechanist stronghold missions with combined human/automated security
No-kill objective missions where guards cannot be neutralized
Expert difficulty enforcement of lethal failure condition

notable_level_patterns.description: Multi-building objective areas with distinct patrol zones. Players must scout routes, identify light sources, and plan tool usage before committing. Emphasis on silent observation from elevated positions.

Rope arrows unlock access to rooftop passages and upper-level infiltration routes. Alternative to ground-level guard patrolling. Creates dynamic risk/reward between visibility (rooftops) and safety (shadows below).

Mechanist facilities feature surveillance cameras, automatons, and light-based detection systems. Requires understanding of mechanical behavior patterns and systematic tool application (water arrows on lights).
Single level contains frameup, blackmail, and theft elements. Player must manage sequence and priority. Completion order affects guard behavior and available escape routes.
Well-lit treasure chambers and wealthy estates signal valuable item locations. Accessible via alternative routes but heavily guarded. Reward player skill and reconnaissance without mandatory access.
